basics.description:
<svg width="75" height="75" viewBox="0 0 75 75" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="75" height="75" rx="12" fill="#1B2A4A"/><text x="37.5" y="47" font-family="Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold">ME</text></svg>

**Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: 

• Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/MimecastEvents-CCF/ReleaseNotes.md)

 • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The **Mimecast Security Events (CCF)** solution ingests Mimecast Secure Email Gateway, Targeted Threat Protection, DLP and Audit events into Microsoft Sentinel via Mimecast Event Push and the Codeless Connector Framework (Push). No Mimecast credentials are stored in Sentinel; Mimecast posts events to the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API using a Microsoft Entra application.

**Data Connectors:** 1, **Parsers:** 7

[Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

basics.toolTip: This filters by workspaces that exist in the Resource Group selected

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for Mimecast Security Events (via Codeless Connector Framework). You can get Mimecast Security Events (via Codeless Connector Framework) data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources
